feat.name: Nalinivati's Light
feat.text: Your slit eyes expand to absorb light and can see in the darkest of places. You gain darkvision.

traits.name: Nagaji
traits.text: Nagaji are brawny humanoids with scaled skin and serpentine heads, many of whom serve or respect nagas.

feat.special: You can select this feat only at 1st level, and you can’t retrain into or out of this feat.
